# Test cooperative fuzzing with test binaries
# Verifies that test binaries can participate in fuzzing

# Build the test_echo binary
exec go build -o test_echo ./examples/test_echo
stdout ''

# Test binary introspection mode
env MCP_SCRIPTTEST_INTROSPECT=1
exec ./test_echo
stdout '"binary_name": "test_echo"'
stdout '"flags":'
stdout '"accepts_stdin": true'

# Test binary generation mode
env MCP_SCRIPTTEST_GENERATE=1
exec ./test_echo 12345
stdout 'test_echo'
stdout -regexp '(-u|--uppercase|-n|--repeat|-s|--separator)?'
stdout -regexp '(hello|world|test|fuzzing)'

# Test binary validation mode
env MCP_SCRIPTTEST_VALIDATE=1
exec ./test_echo -u hello
stdout ''  # No output means valid

# Test validation with invalid args
! exec ./test_echo -invalid flag
stderr 'invalid'

# Test smart generator with cooperative binary
exec go test -v -run TestSmartGeneratorCooperativeFuzzing ./fuzzing
stdout 'Detected cooperative fuzzing support'
stdout 'Generated cooperative command'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test full integration
mcp-server-start echoserver -- go run ./examples/servers/mcp-echo-server
exec go test -v -run TestCooperativeFuzzingIntegration ./fuzzing
stdout 'Cooperative fuzzing successful'
stdout 'PASS'
